title: composefs: Properly add verity info to generated dump file
body:
The payloads in the dump files are relative, but the verityDigests map has absolute filenames.

Also, lets only look for verity digests for regular files, not fot e.g. symlinks (where the payload is the target of the link).

<!--- Please read the [contributing guidelines](https://github.com/containers/container-libs/blob/main/CONTRIBUTING.md) before proceeding --->

comments.body: @giuseppe I think https://github.com/containers/fuse-overlayfs/pull/457 changed the build system and broke our CI here…

> @giuseppe I think [containers/fuse-overlayfs#457](https://github.com/containers/fuse-overlayfs/pull/457) changed the build system and broke our CI here…

I am working on a fix here https://github.com/containers/container-libs/pull/818
I rebased for the ci fix, added some tests and removed the lookup for hardlinks.
